title: Enterprise-managed auth for MCP connectors
summary: Anthropic has added enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, allowing administrators to authorize connectors across their organization through identity providers without requiring individual user setup. This simplifies deployment and security management for enterprise users of Claude.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's new enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, which lets administrators authorize connectors across an organization through identity providers rather than relying on individual user setup. This matters because it centralizes deployment and security management for enterprise Claude users. The concrete takeaway: connector access can be provisioned organization-wide via identity management, removing the per-user authentication step.
